evals.name: bootstrap-fresh-macos-machine
evals.prompt: I am on a fresh macOS machine and just cloned this repository. Nothing is installed yet under ~/.codex/skills or ~/.opencli/plugins. What should I do next to get this packaged workflow ready to use?

evals.name: doctor-apple-events-remediation
evals.prompt: Use trends-radar on an already-installed machine where collection is failing because Google Chrome cannot run JavaScript from Apple Events. Guide the user through the next step without skipping past remediation.

evals.name: collect-rising-queries
evals.prompt: Use trends-radar to help me collect rising queries from several Google Trends compare tabs that I already prepared in Chrome.

evals.name: round2-filter-file
evals.prompt: 使用 trends-radar 做二轮筛选，输入文件是 /tmp/round1.json。请把短期热点和不适合做站的词筛掉。

evals.name: stable-runtime-data-contract
evals.prompt: Use trends-radar to explain where the durable config and append-only usage.jsonl log live, which files survive upgrades, and where I can find the packaged config.example.json shape reference.

evals.name: collect-manual-remediation
evals.prompt: Use trends-radar on an already-installed machine where doctor passes, but one prepared compare tab is no longer on the same geo, time, category, and search property and another is blocked by a CAPTCHA. Guide the next step without pretending the collector can bypass either issue.

evals.name: generic-google-trends-request
evals.prompt: Can you give me a quick summary of what is trending on Google Trends today in the United States?

evals.name: generic-keyword-filtering-request
evals.prompt: I already have a JSON file of candidate keywords. Can you filter out the short-term event terms and tell me which remaining ones look good for a website?
